wireframes.description: Landing view showing overall site health, top findings, stale sources, and repair-readiness status.
wireframes.title: Site Health Home

wireframes.description: KPI and trend view grouped by category, severity, and source status.
wireframes.title: Health Overview Dashboard

wireframes.description: Filtered queue of unresolved findings with category, severity, status, owner, and action mode.
wireframes.title: Health Findings Queue

wireframes.description: Drawer showing finding detail, evidence, desired/observed diff, action eligibility, and HBI explanation.
wireframes.title: Health Finding Detail Drawer

wireframes.description: View comparing required Standard Project Site Template objects with observed objects.
wireframes.title: Template Compliance View

wireframes.description: Provisioning phase, last run, blocked steps, and repair-readiness status.
wireframes.title: Provisioning Status View

wireframes.description: Compliance matrix for required lists, libraries, fields, indexes, and views.
wireframes.title: List and Library Compliance View

wireframes.description: Role/access alignment and permission inheritance summary with redaction.
wireframes.title: Permission and Access Posture View

wireframes.description: Wave 16 settings health snapshots and validation references.
wireframes.title: Settings Health Integration View

wireframes.description: Wave 15 external source health, stale status, mapping completeness, and lineage.
wireframes.title: External Source Health View

wireframes.description: Authorized admin review queue for evidence sufficiency and repair-readiness.
wireframes.title: Admin Verification Queue

wireframes.description: Future-gated repair request drawer with disabled reasons and no execution.
wireframes.title: Repair Request Drawer

wireframes.description: Evidence records, timestamps, confidence, source systems, and redaction details.
wireframes.title: Evidence and Traceability Panel

wireframes.description: Business audit events, finding lifecycle history, and source-read history.
wireframes.title: Audit and Health History

wireframes.description: Grounded HBI explanation, citations, uncertainty, and refusal boundaries.
wireframes.title: HBI Health Explanation Panel

wireframes.description: Mobile-friendly stacked view preserving summary, findings, and drawer access.
wireframes.title: Mobile Responsive Health View
